Dialog.name: TRL_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 0}{f 4 8 0}Equipment is listed in four categories: Weapons, Armor, Footwear, and Accessories.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: TRL_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 0}{f 4 8 0}Weapons primarily influence attack damage, Armor reduces the damage taken by the wearer, Footwear affects the wearer's evasiveness, and Accessories grant the wearer various special effects.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: TRL_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 0}{f 4 8 0}Sometimes, equipment other than Accessories will also grant special effects. Try out different combinations to optimize and specialize your loadout.[n]{f 1 1}
